cards.back: The process by which an image becomes distorted, blurred, or distorted due to various factors such as noise, artifacts, and degradation
There are two types of image degradation: 1) Random Noise and 2) System Degradation
Noise models used in image processing include Gaussian Noise, Salt and Pepper Noise, and Poisson Noise
Noise reduction techniques include Mean Filtering, Median Filtering, and Wiener Filtering
Image reconstruction from degraded images involves using inverse models to estimate the original image from the degraded one
